song.title: Jesus I Am Resting Resting
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Jesus! I am resting, resting In the joy of what Thou art; I am finding out the greatness Of Thy loving heart.|| Thou hast bid me gaze upon Thee, And Thy beauty fills my soul, For, by Thy transforming power, Thou hast made me whole.
[C] Chorus Jesus! I am resting, resting In the joy of what Thou art; I am finding out the greatness Of Thy loving heart.
[V2] 2) Oh, how great Thy lovingkindness, Vaster, broader than the sea! Oh, how marvelous Thy goodness, Lavished all on me!|| Yes, I rest in Thee, Beloved, Know what wealth of grace is Thine, Know Thy certainty of promise, And have made it mine.
[V3] 3) Simply trusting Thee, Lord Jesus, I behold Thee as Thou art, And Thy love, so pure, so changeless, Satisfies my heart,|| Satisfies its deepest longings, Meets, supplies its every need, Compasseth me round with blessings: Thine is love indeed!
[V4] 4) Ever lift Thy face upon me, As I work and wait for Thee; Resting ’neath Thy smile, Lord Jesus, Earth’s dark shadows flee.|| Brightness of my Father’s glory, Sunshine of my Father’s face, Keep me ever trusting, resting, Fill me with Thy grace.
song.author: Jean Sophia Pigott
